descriptions.pt: Página de perfil no github, montada por automação utilizando md-fuse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse
descriptions.en: Profile page on github, mounted by automation using md-fuse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse
descriptions.es: Página de perfil en github, montada por automatización utilizando md-fuse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse

descriptions.pt: Encurtador de links usando React, NestJS (Express) e MongoDB (Mongoose)
descriptions.en: Link shortener using React, NestJS (Express) and MongoDB (Mongoose)
descriptions.es: Encurtador de enlaces usando React, NestJS (Express) y MongoDB (Mongoose)

descriptions.pt: Programa em Python para montar arquivos markdown para diversas línguas. Para a versão em Rust acesse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse
descriptions.en: Python program to mount markdown files for various languages. For the version in Rust access: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse
descriptions.es: Guión en Python para montar archivos markdown para varios idiomas. Para la versión en Rust visite: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse
